global_rules.emotion: Calm, objective, authoritative, completely free of noise.
global_rules.background: Solid dark surfaces. NO gradients. NO purple or teal. Pure focus on data.
global_rules.borders: Crisp 1px borders using neutral zinc/slate. No heavy soft shadows.

numbers_and_data.usage: MANDATORY for all P&L, stock prices, percentages, and tabular data. Align right.

shell.sidebar: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen border-r border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 p-4 flex flex-col gap-6
shell.header: fixed top-0 left-64 right-0 h-16 border-b border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-md z-40 flex justify-between items-center px-6

sections.1_dashboard: Grid bento layout. Top row: 4 stat cards (Equity, Today P&L, Realized P&L, Buying Power). Middle row: Wide chart (P&L Recharts) + Small 'Portfolio Review Flags' list. Bottom row: Open positions table.
sections.2_research: Tabs layout (Watchlist | Influencer Ideas). Watchlist: Table with conviction stars (1-5), ticker, thesis text truncation. Influencer Ideas: Masonry/Grid of Idea Cards (Ticker, Channel, Bull/Bear badge, AI Thesis).
sections.3_settings: Max width 3xl centered container. Sections split by dividers. Trading Mode toggle (requires typed 'CONFIRM LIVE'). Presets: 3 large selectable cards (Conservative/Balanced/Aggressive). Automation Scheduler: Simple cron-like dropdowns.
sections.4_history: Tabs (Trade History | P&L Reports). Trade history table with pagination. Reports: Recharts line chart benchmarking account vs SPY.

components.card: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-5 overflow-hidden
components.stat_tile: flex flex-col gap-1. Label: text-xs font-semibold text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wider. Value: text-3xl font-mono text-zinc-50.
components.button_primary: bg-zinc-50 text-zinc-950 hover:bg-zinc-200 font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors
components.button_danger_kill_switch: bg-rose-500/10 text-rose-500 border border-rose-500/20 hover:bg-rose-500 hover:text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-xs transition-all
components.badge_bull: bg-emerald-400/10 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-400/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono uppercase
components.badge_bear: bg-rose-400/10 text-rose-400 border border-rose-400/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono uppercase
components.table: w-full text-left text-sm. Th: border-b border-zinc-800 pb-2 text-zinc-500 font-medium. Td: py-3 border-b border-zinc-800/50 text-zinc-300.
components.tabs: flex space-x-6 border-b border-zinc-800 mb-6. Active: border-b-2 border-zinc-50 text-zinc-50 pb-2. Inactive: text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-300 pb-2.
components.inputs: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-50 placeholder-zinc-600 focus:border-zinc-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-500 rounded-md px-3 py-2

testing_requirements.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
